Portfolio

Connect Exchange Accounts
Check your balance across different exchanges on the go using API keys
Connect Public Addresses
Track your external wallet balances across different blockchains – BTC, ERC20, Polygon, Binance Smart Chain, and many more
Manual Input
Manually enter the number of coins you own and track your portfolio balance easily

Widgets

Stay updated from your Home screen
Receive price notifications without opening the app
Fully Customizable Widgets
Only display what you need on your home screen; e.g. customizable news widget, your token pair charts and/or market cap data

Powerful Integrations

Our systems pull, inspect and combine data from multiple sources – price aggregators, exchange APIs, news publishers, raw blockchain nodes and more.

Community Reviews

An average of 4.6 over 80,000 reviews – Draw your own conclusion!

This app is great. Tons of great info and alerts. Plus, just a one time fee for premium, sign me up.

Shelby Watson

Other apps require an account to “favorite” cryptos. This one doesn’t. Thank you for respecting my time.

Craig0965874

So far so good. Convenient, accurate crypto prices. Also, it’s a widget on my iPhone, which is nice.

Stevus Maximus

Great tool! Everything works smoothly for me and the crypto news updates plus the alerts are a major thumbs up for me. Keep up the work.

YaohNadab Aray

Love the details! Custom alerts, great layout, packed full of features and its about 20x as fast as Coinbase.

Lili
